basic_info.short_form: Usha Rama College of Engineering and Technology Krishna

address.address: NH-16, Telaprolu, Ungutur Mandalam, Near Gannavaram India
address.map_location: Usha Rama College Road , Near Gannavaram Ungutur Mandalam, Telaprolu, Andhra Pradesh

pos_sentences: Information technology is one of the best courses at Usha Rama College of Engineering and Technology.
My internship is very good. My project is networking and data warehouse concepts. The duration of my internship is 8 months. I have gained very good experience and knowledge.
Placements are one of the best parts of our college as they provide us with the best companies in the best roles.
If a student excels with great ranks in this EAMCET exam, there is also a chance of getting a free seat in our college.

Extracurricular activities are good, as every college has them. There will be cricket, volleyball, shuttle, table tennis, carroms, running, relay, and practice nets. For girls, there will be throw ball, kokoo, running race, shuttle, and carroms.
A hostel is also available in our college, which is separate for boys and girls, with neat and clean rooms. The fee structure for the hostel is 35000 per year, including food.
It is good for almost all requirements. They will help you learn everything required to face world competition after graduation.
neg_sentences: The examination structure was really secure, and as we are affiliated with the JNTU Kakinada University, we follow their examination structure.

The placement situation at our college is the worst part. They take money but dont organize any placement drives. Moreover, those who come for placements dont consider students talent. They only focus on appearances and make decisions accordingly.

Based on my knowledge, I am unaware of the scholarships offered by the college. However, they do offer reduced fees for financially disadvantaged students and provide installment options for fee payment.

To view it, an application fee is not required because the fee structure is comparatively much lower compared to nearby autonomous institutions. CSE is currently in high demand. In the admission process, we have observed some improvements.
